public Task<EntityCollection> RetrieveMultipleAsync(QueryExpression query, CancellationToken ct = default)
{
    using ServiceClient svc = _factory.Create();
    return Task.FromResult(svc.RetrieveMultiple(query));
}

public Task<OrganizationResponse> ExecuteAsync(OrganizationRequest request, CancellationToken ct = default)
{
    using ServiceClient svc = _factory.Create();
    return Task.FromResult(svc.Execute(request));
}
